ham.subject: Corporate VPN Maintenance – Scheduled Update on Aug 15
ham.body:
Hello IT Team,

Please be advised that our corporate VPN service will undergo scheduled maintenance on August 15, 2024 from 02:00 AM to 04:00 AM UTC. During this window, VPN connectivity may be unavailable.

To minimize disruption, please ensure that all remote devices are updated with the latest VPN client before the maintenance window.

If you encounter any issues, contact the support desk at <URL>.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best,
IT Operations

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Gift Card Transfer Needed
spam.body:
Dear Team,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to you with an urgent matter that requires your immediate attention.

Due to a recent audit requirement, I need to transfer a corporate gift card to a valued partner. Please process the following request within the next 24 hours:

- Recipient: Global Partners Inc.
- Gift Card Code: <URL>
- Amount: $5,000

Please confirm once the transaction is completed. Failure to act promptly may result in a delay of our partnership agreement and potential penalties.

Thank you for your swift cooperation.

Best regards,
[CEO Name]
Chief Executive Officer
